name: Zombie
description: A hostile mob that spawns in dark areas. Burns in sunlight. Drops rotten flesh.

name: Zombie Villager
description: A villager turned into a zombie. Can be cured with a golden apple and weakness potion.

name: Drowned
description: Underwater zombie that can spawn with tridents.

name: Husk
description: Desert zombie variant. Does not burn in sunlight.

name: Skeleton
description: Shoots arrows. Burns in sunlight. Drops bones and arrows.

name: Stray
description: Skeleton variant in cold biomes. Shoots arrows of Slowness.

name: Wither Skeleton
description: Spawns in Nether fortresses. Inflicts Wither. Drops coal, bones, and rarely skulls.

name: Creeper
description: Approaches and explodes. Drops gunpowder.

name: Charged Creeper
description: A creeper struck by lightning. Larger explosion, drops mob heads.

name: Spider
description: Hostile at night, neutral in daylight. Climbs walls.

name: Cave Spider
description: Smaller venomous spider in mineshafts.

name: Enderman
description: Tall mob that teleports and picks up blocks. Aggressive if looked at.

name: Endermite
description: Small hostile that spawns rarely when using ender pearls.

name: Shulker
description: Shell-like mob in End cities. Fires levitation projectiles.

name: Witch
description: Throws splash potions. Spawns in swamps and raids.

name: Slime
description: Spawns in swamps and slime chunks. Splits when killed.

name: Magma Cube
description: Nether slime variant. Drops magma cream.

name: Phantom
description: Flying mob that attacks players who haven't slept.

name: Blaze
description: Found in Nether fortresses. Shoots fireballs. Drops blaze rods.

name: Ghast
description: Flying Nether mob that shoots explosive fireballs.

name: Hoglin
description: Hostile boar-like mob in the Nether.

name: Zoglin
description: A zombified Hoglin.

name: Piglin
description: Neutral if wearing gold armor. Barters gold ingots.

name: Piglin Brute
description: Stronger hostile Piglin in Bastion Remnants.

name: Ender Dragon
description: The final boss. Defeat by destroying crystals then attacking.

name: Wither
description: A boss spawned with soul sand and skulls. Drops a nether star.

name: Warden
description: Powerful mob spawned by sculk. Blind but senses vibrations.

name: Iron Golem
description: Neutral mob that protects villages.

name: Snow Golem
description: Passive mob built from snow. Throws snowballs.

name: Villager
description: Passive mob that trades items.

name: Wandering Trader
description: Spawns randomly offering rare trades.

name: Cow
description: Passive mob that drops beef and leather. Can be milked.

name: Pig
description: Passive mob that drops porkchops.

name: Sheep
description: Passive mob that drops wool and mutton.

name: Chicken
description: Passive mob that drops feathers and raw chicken. Lays eggs.

name: Rabbit
description: Small passive mob.

name: Mooshroom
description: Cow variant on mushroom islands.

name: Horse
description: Can be tamed and ridden.

name: Donkey
description: Can be tamed and equipped with a chest.

name: Mule
description: Born from horse and donkey. Can carry a chest.

name: Skeleton Horse
description: A rideable undead horse.

name: Zombie Horse
description: A rare undead horse. Cannot be tamed in survival.

name: Llama
description: Carries chests and forms caravans.

name: Trader Llama
description: Llamas that follow wandering traders.

name: Wolf
description: Neutral mob tamed with bones.

name: Cat
description: Tamed with raw fish. Scares creepers.

name: Parrot
description: Passive flying mob that mimics sounds.

name: Fox
description: Nocturnal mob that picks up items.

name: Bee
description: Pollinates crops and produces honey.

name: Bat
description: Flying passive mob in caves.

name: Squid
description: Passive water mob that drops ink sacs.

name: Glow Squid
description: Passive glowing water mob.

name: Dolphin
description: Neutral water mob that boosts swimming.

name: Turtle
description: Passive beach mob that lays eggs.

name: Polar Bear
description: Neutral mob in snowy biomes.

name: Panda
description: Neutral mob in bamboo jungles.

name: Ocelot
description: Passive jungle mob. Creepers avoid them.

name: Axolotl
description: Passive water mob that plays dead.

name: Frog
description: Passive mob found in swamps. Eats small slimes.

name: Tadpole
description: Baby frog. Grows into a frog.

name: Allay
description: Flying mob that collects items for players.

name: Goat
description: Neutral mountain mob that rams players.

name: Ravager
description: Large hostile mob in raids.

name: Evoker
description: Hostile illager that summons vexes.

name: Vindicator
description: Hostile illager with an axe.

name: Pillager
description: Hostile illager with a crossbow.

name: Vex
description: Small hostile flying mob. Passes through blocks.

name: Illusioner
description: Hostile illager that creates illusions.
